name: llm-kb-customer-support-feasibility
title: LLM Knowledge Base Customer Support Feasibility
creator: mac
notes: Completed research/PRD only. No implementation started. Recommended SQLite-first public support assistant MVP using sqlite-vec via modernc.org/sqlite/vec, provider ports with DeepSeek-compatible defaults, admin-managed KB sources, manual/Markdown/URL ingestion, and chat-first lead capture.
